title: Research reports
description: An on-demand or interpreter-triggered literature deep-dive, tied to a lab result, a symptom, or a free topic.

labResultId.description: the lab result this expands (null if not lab-driven)

symptomId.description: the symptom this expands (null if not symptom-driven)

body.description: the report, markdown with citations; empty while pending

status.description: 'pending' while the researcher runs, 'ready' when done
